name: check_toxicity
description: Screen molecules for SMARTS structural alerts and PAINS patterns. Call AFTER standardize_smiles. If the molecule passes (no alerts, no PAINS hits), the natural next tool is predict_admet. If it fails, stop and report the structural liability — synthesizing a known toxicophore wastes reagent.

smiles_list.description: Optional batch mode list of SMILES strings.
